name: com.appgoblin.mcp
title: AppGoblin Intelligence Server
description: Official MCP Server for AppGoblin mobile app intelligence, SDK tracking, and ASO keyword metrics. Query app metadata, growth estimates, SDK manifests, company market share, and keyword difficulty across Android and iOS.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: AppGoblin API key — send as `Bearer <token>`. Generate one from the account dashboard at https://appgoblin.info/account/api-keys
